data.name: Oppaidius Desert Island!
data.detailed_description:
THE EPIC CONCLUSION!
After a dramatic shipwreck, you end up on a island with Angela, an incredible girl! Now you two are stuck together on a desert island! What will happen...?

- No censorship!
- Gorgeous art by Vittorio Giorgi, with more than 200 hand-drawn animation frames
- Legendary composer Keiji Yamagishi (Ninja Gaiden, Captain Tsubasa series, Streets Of Rage 4) joins the game with an original track!
- A detailed story with more than 33K words, spanning several different endings!
- More than 140 "jiggle breast physics" hand-drawn frames! Is this a new World Record for a video game...?!?
- Japanese guest musicians! Masashi Kageyama from Gimmick! and Tsuyoshi Kaneko of Yakuza saga and SEGAGAGA fame!
- A new mysterious girl to interact with...?
- Sizlla Okamura, the composer of the NeoGeo cult classic Viewpoint, produced an exclusive remix track for the game!
- A fun set of Steam achievements to pursue!
- An awesome "Oppaidius Xtreme Beach Volley" RPG style minigame!
- Original music score done with an FM-synth chip (Yamaha YM2151) by Luca Della Regina (Xydonia, Steel Assault)
- Pixel art backgrounds with native resolutions and color palette from retro-consoles
- Steam page header image art by Joël Jurion!

data.short_description: W-w-w-whaaaaat...? I'm on a desert island, alone with Angela... NAKED...? Discover what happens next in this original visual novel!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
